script_text: Third graders learn more grammar moves.
Verb tenses, subject agreement, and comparing things.
Past: I walked. Present: I walk. Future: I will walk.
Use -ER to compare two things. Tall, taller.
Use -EST for three or more. Tall, taller, tallest!
Read your sentence aloud. If it sounds off, try a different verb form.
Now you are ready for verb tenses and more!
